title: [WIP] vendor containers/{image,storage}
body:
Avoid redundantly pulling the same image (or layer).

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Do not merge this PR, it's used to increase confidence for the changes to storage and image by letting it pass libpod's CI.
Need to fix up some things in the PR and merge https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1400 first to unblock.
@vrothberg I'll mark this as WIP then
